# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore - Overview

## Core Definition
Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is an agentic platform for building, deploying, and operating highly effective agents securely at scale using any framework and foundation model.

## Core Services

| Service | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Runtime** | Secure, serverless runtime for deploying/scaling dynamic AI agents and tools. Features: fast cold starts, extended async support, session isolation, built-in identity, multi-modal/multi-agent support |
| **Memory** | Context-aware agents with short-term (multi-turn) and long-term (cross-session) memory with sharing capabilities |
| **Gateway** | Converts APIs, Lambda functions, existing services into MCP-compatible tools. Connects to pre-existing MCP servers |
| **Identity** | Secure agent identity/access/authentication management compatible with existing IdPs (Amazon Cognito, Okta, Microsoft Azure Entra ID, Auth0) |
| **Code Interpreter** | Isolated sandbox for agents to execute code (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript) |
| **Browser** | Fast, secure cloud-based browser runtime for web interaction |
| **Observability** | Unified tracing, debugging, monitoring via OpenTelemetry (OTEL)-compatible format |
| **Evaluations** | Automated agent assessment measuring execution quality, edge case handling, output reliability |
| **Policy** | Deterministic control using natural language or Cedar policy language |

## Supported Frameworks
CrewAI, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Strands Agents, LangChain, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK

## Supported Models
Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, Amazon Nova, Meta Llama, Mistral

## Protocols
Model Context Protocol (MCP), A2A (Agent-to-Agent), OpenTelemetry (OTEL), OpenInference

## Integrations
Salesforce, Zoom, JIRA, Slack (via Gateway)

## Pricing
Consumption-based (no upfront commitments or minimum fees)
